conflictBlocks.oursContent:
<View style={{ marginLeft: 10, flexShrink: 1 }}>
            <Image
              source={{ uri: BRAND_WORDMARK_URL }}
              // Bigger + taller so it’s readable (keep width a bit tighter so it fits on all iPhones)
              style={{ width: 225, height: 30 }}
              resizeMode="contain"
            />
conflictBlocks.theirsContent:
<View style={{ marginLeft: 10 }}>
            {!wordmarkFailed ? (
              <Image
                source={{ uri: BRAND_WORDMARK_URL }}
                style={{ width: 240, height: 24 }}
                resizeMode="contain"
                onError={() => setWordmarkFailed(true)}
              />
            ) : (
              <Text
                style={{
                  fontFamily: "System",
                  fontWeight: "900",
                  fontSize: 18,
                  color: "#0D9488",
                  lineHeight: 22,
                }}
              >
                {BRAND_NAME}
              </Text>
            )}

conflictBlocks.oursContent:
<View style={{ marginLeft: 10, flexShrink: 1 }}>
          <Image
            source={{ uri: BRAND_WORDMARK_URL }}
            // Bigger + taller so it’s readable (keep width a bit tighter so it fits on all iPhones)
            style={{ width: 225, height: 30 }}
            resizeMode="contain"
          />
conflictBlocks.theirsContent:
<View style={{ marginLeft: 10 }}>
          {!wordmarkFailed ? (
            <Image
              source={{ uri: BRAND_WORDMARK_URL }}
              style={{ width: 240, height: 24 }}
              resizeMode="contain"
              onError={() => setWordmarkFailed(true)}
            />
          ) : (
            <Text
              style={{
                fontFamily: "System",
                fontWeight: "900",
                fontSize: 18,
                color: "#0D9488",
                lineHeight: 22,
              }}
            >
              {BRAND_NAME}
            </Text>
          )}

preservedBehaviors.description: mobile and web brand.js use the d3dcc884 wordmark asset URL
AppHeader uses wordmark dimensions 225x30 for readability
ScribeHeader uses wordmark dimensions 225x30 for readability
web Header uses larger wordmark height (h-10 or h-12)
AppHeader has wordmark fallback with onError handler and BRAND_NAME text
ScribeHeader has wordmark fallback with onError handler and BRAND_NAME text
web Header has wordmark fallback with onError handler and brandName text
